name: Spinach, Corn and Quinoa Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, bring the chicken broth and 2 cups water to boil over high heat.
2. Stir in the quinoa and cooked chicken; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Add the spinach, corn, and scallions; return to boiling.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
